title: Tokyo Revengers Mod
description: This mod adds costumes, objects, weapons and accessories from the Toyko Revengers anime
body:
Hello everyone!

First of all **Happy 2025!**

![https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tokyo-revengers-mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf8ef47ebb400f8c33de6a651acc0ba0a1668f19_0.webp)

Today I'm going to present you the **_Tokyo Revengers Anime Mod!_**

![Mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2983d2437a3fccfce14566207f6894003a3a5c98.png)

# Q&A
Q: Why i upload this mod here ? 

A: Because this mod is japanese and it's too hard to install from the original japanese site.

Q: Will this mod receive updates?

A: YEAH! The new update is in production.
# 

# Current version: 3

Changelog: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UInk7aLeajc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




Here is a summary of the anime then we will go to the summary of the mod!:

Takemichi Hanagaki is living in decay due to financial problems and discovers that his  ex-girlfriend was murdered by a group known as the Tokyo Manji Gang. At rock bottom,  he discovers that time travel is possible and skips twelve years back to his high school days. I n order to save his ex-girlfriend, he goes a long way and infiltrates the Manji gang to sign the  boss , known as Kanto.  

## Mod Details
First this mod is for 1.16.5 version It adds weapons, armors and more!

In this mod, you can choose to belong to a gang, and also everything you do will be registered,  in the place of achievements, such as killing a person.
